steps.title: Identify the needed contrast
steps.content: The student wants a distinction between the two portolan traditions. The relevant notes give one clear difference: Venetian charts tended to be sparse in illustrations, while Majorcan charts tended to be richly illustrated.

steps.title: Reject vague or reversed details
steps.content: B says the charts differed but does not specify the difference. C pairs Majorcan illustration style with a general feature of all portolan charts, and D reverses the traditions' illustration styles. The choice that contrasts richly illustrated Majorcan charts with sparser Venetian ones meets the goal. The answer is A.
